label: planning
insight: Agent loops decompose goals into measure, ticket, transfer, and close; lag requires idempotent retries and no double-close; weights stay human-authorized.
user_sample: How should Perci plan an agent loop with measure ticket transfer close under lag?
note: operator agent-loop-plan owns speech; pack optional

label: systems
insight: Cross-domain composition binds geometry boundaries to planning feasible sets and systems contracts under lag without melting mechanisms into one substance.
user_sample: Compose geometry and systems: apply geometric intuition to planning under lag

label: logic
insight: Confidence tracks authority and gates: refuse invented tokens and consciousness claims; exact tools earn high confidence only with checkable results.
user_sample: How should you calibrate confidence and when should you refuse for insufficient evidence?

label: memory
insight: Ledgers record geometry and lab actions; Cortex is append-only recall; closed tickets age chronic primary_off nags; never auto-promote weights from JSONL.
user_sample: How do Cortex append-only records and the emergence ledger integrate with Bitwork prototypes?

label: governance
insight: Self-critique expands thin drafts from residual mass; /think and /trace stay inspectable; human chat stays clean; queue suggestions open tickets not weight edits.
user_sample: What should /think and /trace show for self-critique and the self-improve queue?

label: systems
insight: Novel entity generalization keeps structural keywords for routing and injects names as surface shift; transfer scores structure not entity parrot; do not densify the pack to memorize names.
user_sample: How do we generalize under novel entities and entity-swap without overfitting templates?
